Employment Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

  2. Our policy is to provide equal employment to all qualified persons without regard to race, creed, color, religious belief, sex, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental handicap, or veteran status.
  15. What job(s) would you like to apply for?*

    See job descriptions at emporiarec.org for more information.

  19. Are you Lifeguard Certified?

    We have classes if you are not certified or need to renew your certification.

  36. Please indicate any vacations, school activities, other work schedules, etc here.

  40. Please note that the Emporia Recreation Commission will run a full background check prior to hiring. If you have been convicted of a felony, please check the box below:

  48. We thank you for your interest in working with the Emporia Recreation Commission.  Please contact us at 620-340-6300 with questions or for more information.  

  52. Leave This Blank:

  54. This field is not part of the form submission.
